about.title: Crafting digital experiences with purpose
about.familyBlurb: They inspire everything I do. Building a better future, one line of code at a time.
about.bioP1: Highly skilled Senior iOS Engineer with over 8 years of experience specializing in high-performance mobile architectures for the fintech and startup sectors. Proven track record in leading distributed engineering teams, scaling applications from MVP to mass-market adoption, and modernizing legacy codebases.
about.bioP2: Passionate community leader and mentor, dedicated to fostering technological growth through Google Developer Groups (GDG) and educational content creation. Committed to code quality, collaborative problem-solving, and continuous learning.
about.bioP3: Podcast host and founder of DevLokos.
about.motto: Be DIFFERENT and leave a legacy to the world that everything is possible when you have it in your mind.

podcast.apiHelpTitle: To load podcast episodes from YouTube:
podcast.apiHelpStep2: In APIs & Services → Library, enable YouTube Data API v3.
podcast.apiHelpStep3: Create an API key in Credentials.
podcast.apiHelpStep5: Restart the dev server (npm run dev).
podcast.apiHelpListen: Meanwhile, you can listen on YouTube.

waitlist.title: Join the waitlist
waitlist.description: Be among the first to know when the book on Kotlin, Swift, and Dart comes out. No spam—only important updates.
waitlist.editionNote: This waitlist is for the Spanish-language edition of the book.
waitlist.closedNotice: Signups will open soon while we finalize payments. You can still read the pre-sale info below.
waitlist.successAlert:
Thanks for reserving your spot!

We'll email you pre-order details by {{date}} at the latest. Check spam or promotions folders too.
waitlist.web3NotifyFail: Note: Web3Forms did not send the notification ({{detail}}). Your signup was still saved. Try Contact or check the browser console if it keeps happening.
waitlist.web3KeyMissing: Note: NEXT_PUBLIC_WEB3FORMS_ACCESS_KEY is missing from the site build, so the author won't get a Web3Forms copy. Set it in Vercel (or .env.local), redeploy, and check spam/promotions.
waitlist.duplicateEmail: This email is already on the waitlist.
waitlist.errorSend: Couldn't sign you up. Please try again.

preorder.offerBody: Because you're on the waitlist, you get early access to the book at a special price before the official launch.
preorder.ended: Pre-order has ended; the official launch is almost here.
preorder.gratitude: Thanks for supporting this project from the start

login.title: Admin
login.intro: Sign in with the same email and password as your Firebase Authentication user.
login.missingFirebase: Firebase Auth can’t run here: NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* env vars are missing (at least API key and project ID). Locally, add them to .env.local and restart. In production, set them in your host’s environment settings and redeploy (values are in Firebase console → Project settings → Your apps).

home.title: Dashboard
home.intro: Manage talks and projects published on the site (Firestore + Storage).
home.conferencesDesc: Create, edit, and delete conference entries (site admin in Firestore).
home.projectsDesc: Create, edit, and delete project entries (site admin in Firestore).

waitlistPanel.title: Waitlist
waitlistPanel.intro: Signups from the book popup (Firestore prod/admin/waitlist). Up to 500 most recent.

api.firebaseAdmin: Firebase Admin isn’t configured (FIREBASE_ADMIN_SDK_KEY or GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS on the server).
api.emailNotAllowed: Your email is not listed in ADMIN_ALLOWED_EMAILS, or the session is invalid. Check server env vars or sign in again.
api.tokenRejected: The server rejected your Firebase Auth token. Usually FIREBASE_ADMIN_SDK_KEY on the host is not from the same Firebase project as NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID (same Firebase console / web app). Ensure the service account JSON private_key newlines are \n. Signing out will not fix this until the env is corrected.
